commands: sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl -n yanxi-validation run mdl-inspect --rm -i --restart=Never --image=busybox:1.36 --overrides="{\"spec\":{\"nodeSelector\":{\"kubernetes.io/hostname\":\"ip-10-1-12-160.us-east-2.compute.internal\"},\"tolerations\":[{\"key\":\"nvidia.com/gpu\",\"operator\":\"Equal\",\"value\":\"true\",\"effect\":\"NoSchedule\"}],\"containers\":[{\"name\":\"x\",\"image\":\"busybox:1.36\",\"command\":[\"sh\",\"-c\",\"ls -la /m/current/ | head -30; echo ---; cat /m/current/config.json 2>/dev/null | head -40; echo ---; cat /m/current/model.safetensors.index.json 2>/dev/null | head -10\"],\"volumeMounts\":[{\"name\":\"m\",\"mountPath\":\"/m\"}]}],\"volumes\":[{\"name\":\"m\",\"hostPath\":{\"path\":\"/var/lib/yanxi-models\"}}]}}" 2>&1 | tail -80'
